spec: g(mu)=1/AGM(1,sqrt(1+mu^2)) [=(2/pi)*kappa*K(kappa'), Eisler arXiv:2410.16433 (72) -> QRN K_NN=g*pi*xi]; mu^2=cos^2(ky)+cos^2(kz); r_x=<g>_BZ; r_perp=<2cos^2(ky)*g>_BZ; lambda=1/r; BZ uniform, reduced to [0,pi/2]^2 by cos^2 symmetry

method.A: 3D torus midpoint n=512 (integral form, no AGM)
method.R: interval Riemann n=32768 on [0,pi/2]^2, outward rounding, cos via remainder-padded Taylor, interval AGM, hierarchical sums, exact /2^k

anisotropy_theorem: r_perp - r_x = 2 Cov(Y, h(Y+Z)) < 0 with Y=cos^2 ky, Z=cos^2 kz independent, E[Y]=1/2, h(s)=g(sqrt(s)) strictly decreasing (g'<0) — Chebyshev correlation inequality conditioned on Z; interval proof: r_x.lo - r_perp.hi > 0
